data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with the Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

data.content:
All **5 integration tests passed**. The command used:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` syntax to match tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`.
